narrative:
Dunham West (precinct in Washington County) has 895 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.6 percentage points.
